codeReview.summary: The docs refresh does not satisfy the feature intent or the docs-platform contract. README was reduced to only a disclaimer, so setup flow, package-manager guidance, supported web behavior, and shipped-vs-backlog separation are missing instead of being refreshed truthfully.

issues.description: README now contains only the title and disclaimer, so it no longer documents the current web app, setup flow, supported pnpm workflow, environment/setup guidance, or shipped-vs-backlog separation required by VAL-PLATFORM-001 and the feature description.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker marked the docs feature as effectively complete even though the current README is missing most required product/setup content and the handoff states a successful README refresh. The skill may need stronger explicit checks that required truth-source sections still exist after edits, not just that stale words were removed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Current README.md only has the heading and disclaimer. Handoff 2026-03-30T05-02-06-661Z claims README was updated to describe the web-only platform, shipped feature set, and pnpm-based setup/validation commands.

summary: Review failed: the current docs state is missing the required README content, so the feature did not actually deliver the requested truthful web-only documentation refresh.
